title: Maoutia puya
taxonomy: Maoutia puya is classified as a plant species in the family Urticaceae. It belongs to the genus Maoutia and is a type of flowering plant. Maoutia puya is native to the Pacific Islands, specifically in French Polynesia. The plant is also known as the Maoutia puya tree or Maoutia puya shrub due to its woody nature. Further classification of Maoutia puya would include its order and family in the botanical classification system.
